svg.title: Commit 3 WebSocket architecture
svg.desc: Diagram showing the WebSocket connection between Next.js frontend and FastAPI backend with the 6 message types

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I build the useWebSocket hook in Next.js?')
sendPrompt('How does the WorkflowGraph component consume WebSocket logs?')
sendPrompt('How does the SourceLibrary component update when SOURCE_FOUND arrives?')
sendPrompt('How does the AWAITING_INPUT state transform the UI into buttons?')
sendPrompt('How does the ResponseDispatcher render the COMPLETE payload?')
sendPrompt('How do I write the FastAPI WebSocket endpoint for /ws/research?')
sendPrompt('How does the connection manager handle multiple sessions?')
sendPrompt('How do I write the fake log simulator for testing the WebSocket?')
sendPrompt('How does the message dispatcher handle USER_CHOICE from the frontend?')
sendPrompt('What PydanticAI models should I define in commit 3 for the protocol?')
